nasb.text: Gideon said, “All right, when the Lord has given Zebah and Zalmunna into my hand, then I will thrash your bodies with the thorns of the wilderness and with briers.”

esv.text: So Gideon said, “Well then, when the Lord has given Zebah and Zalmunna into my hand, I will flail your flesh with the thorns of the wilderness and with briers.”

cnv.text: 基甸說：“好吧，耶和華把西巴和撒慕拿交在我手裡的時候，我就必用野地的荊棘鞭打你們的身體。”

ccb.text: 基甸说：“好吧，耶和华把西巴和撒慕拿交在我们手中后，我必回来用荒野的荆棘抽打你们。”
